brief: Domain acme-corp.example exposes 14 subdomains incl. a stale dev portal; 2 emails appear in breach corpora; GitHub org leaks a CI token pattern.

findings.finding: 14 subdomains via cert transparency; dev-legacy is internet-exposed and unpatched.
2 corporate emails found in 2 breach corpora (passwords not validated).
Public repo contains a high-entropy string matching a CI token format (CVE-2024-12345 referenced in an issue).
